# Contributing

Thanks for considering a contribution! This project is part of the **VPDLNY (Vulnerable Persons Defense League of NY)** open-tools collective.

## Quick Start

1. **Fork** the repo
2. **Create a branch** off `main`: `git checkout -b feat/your-feature`
3. **Commit** with [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) style: `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, etc.
4. **Push** and open a Pull Request against `main`
5. **Reference any issue** the PR closes: `Closes #123`

## Before You Open a PR

- ✅ Your code runs locally
- ✅ Any new dependencies are justified in the PR description
- ✅ READMEs and docs are updated if behavior changes
- ✅ No secrets, API tokens, or private data in commits
- ✅ Commits are signed (we require this on `main`)

## Sensitive Issues

If you've found a **security vulnerability**, do NOT open a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) — preferred channel is a Bluesky DM to [@indicaindependent.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/indicaindependent.bsky.social).

If your issue involves **harm to vulnerable people** (doxxing risk, targeted harassment, etc.), reach out privately via Bluesky DM first so we can coordinate safely.

## Style

- **JavaScript / TypeScript:** Cloudflare Workers idioms, no unnecessary build steps when avoidable
- **Python:** PEP 8, type hints where they help readability
- **Markdown:** ATX headers, em-dash sentences, mobile-first formatting

## What Makes a Great PR

- **Small and focused** — one feature or fix per PR
- **Tests where they make sense** — not religion, just signal
- **Clear PR description** — what changed, why, how to verify
- **Linked context** — issue numbers, related PRs, Bluesky discussion if any

## Communication

- **Public discussion:** [vpdlny-tools Discussions](https://github.com/indicaindependent/vpdlny-tools/discussions)
- **Real-time:** [Indica Independent Media Discord](https://osintnet.uk/discord)
- **Async / private:** Bluesky DM

---

*Information is the weapon. We sharpen it together.*
